		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
The accept change structural feature event action is used to detect value changing on the value property &lt;b&gt;time&lt;/b&gt;. When the value of &lt;b&gt;time&lt;/b&gt; has been changed, the control application will calculate for the feedback signal using the value of pendulum angle and the cart displacement obtained from the encoders.

    &lt;/p&gt;

  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>
	</mdElement>

  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;font color=&quot;#990000&quot; style=&quot;font-size:18pt;&quot;&gt;Feedback Control Signal Calculation Process&lt;/font&gt;&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>

    &lt;p&gt;
The SysML Block Definition Diagram shows the blocks and association blocks which are defined to be used in the inverted pendulum system. You can double click on the block to explore it.

				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367598026662_908628_12258' name='AngularVelocityEquation'>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
						<modelExtension/>
					</xmi:Extension>
					<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367598026673_46612_12260'>

						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367598026674_563325_12261'>

				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367554942351_539644_12715' name='EfficientcyEquation'>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
						<modelExtension/>
					</xmi:Extension>
					<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367555020035_382_12750'>
						<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0_4_17530432_1367554942351_539644_12715'/>
						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367555020035_396231_12751'>
							<body>efficiency = powerOutput / suppliedPower</body>
						</specification>
					</ownedRule>

				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367682335937_965513_19977' name='ACElectricPowerEquation'>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
						<modelExtension/>
					</xmi:Extension>
					<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367682335949_598475_19979'>
						<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0_4_17530432_1367682335937_965513_19977'/>
						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367682335949_748102_19980'>
							<body>power = v x i</body>
						</specification>
					</ownedRule>

							</xmi:Extension>

				</packagedElement>
				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367734384258_531803_21886' name='PowerEquation'>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
						<modelExtension/>
					</xmi:Extension>
					<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367734384271_388820_21888'>
						<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0_4_17530432_1367734384258_531803_21886'/>
						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367734384271_189522_21889'>

						</type>
					</ownedAttribute>

				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367734595609_224237_22113' name='Derivative'>

						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367734595619_272576_22116'>
							<body>y = derivative(x)</body>
						</specification>
					</ownedRule>
					<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367734937696_979348_22434' name='y' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>

					</ownedAttribute>

							</xmi:Extension>
						</type>
					</ownedAttribute>
				</packagedElement>
				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367735987369_746731_23367' name='PendulumDynamicsEquation'>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
						<modelExtension/>
					</xmi:Extension>
					<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367735987381_224682_23369'>
						<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0_4_17530432_1367735987369_746731_23367'/>
						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367735987382_94293_23370'>
							<body>(M+m)*x2 - m*l*z2cos(z) + m*l*(z1^2)*sin(z) = F</body>
						</specification>
					</ownedRule>
					<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367736232325_956644_23411' name='unnamed1'>
						<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0_4_17530432_1367735987369_746731_23367'/>
						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367736232325_138165_23412'>
							<body>l*z2 - 9.81*sin(z) = x2*cos(z)</body>
						</specification>
					</ownedRule>
					<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367736299535_718721_23414' name='F' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
						<type href='http://www.omg.org/spec/SysML/20150709/SysML.xmi#_SysML_Libraries_PackageableElement-PrimitiveValueTypes_PackageableElement-Real_PackageableElement'>
							<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
								<referenceExtension referentPath='SysML::Libraries::PrimitiveValueTypes::Real' referentType='DataType' originalID='_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147431819399_50461_1671'/>
							</xmi:Extension>
						</type>
					</ownedAttribute>
					<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367736299615_214054_23462' name='z1' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
						<type href='http://www.omg.org/spec/SysML/20150709/SysML.xmi#_SysML_Libraries_PackageableElement-PrimitiveValueTypes_PackageableElement-Real_PackageableElement'>
							<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
								<referenceExtension referentPath='SysML::Libraries::PrimitiveValueTypes::Real' referentType='DataType' originalID='_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147431819399_50461_1671'/>
							</xmi:Extension>
						</type>
					</ownedAttribute>
					<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367736299669_332170_23494' name='M' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
						<type href='http://www.omg.org/spec/SysML/20150709/SysML.xmi#_SysML_Libraries_PackageableElement-PrimitiveValueTypes_PackageableElement-Real_PackageableElement'>
							<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
								<referenceExtension referentPath='SysML::Libraries::PrimitiveValueTypes::Real' referentType='DataType' originalID='_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147431819399_50461_1671'/>
							</xmi:Extension>
						</type>
					</ownedAttribute>
					<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367736299696_654430_23510' name='z2' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
						<type href='http://www.omg.org/spec/SysML/20150709/SysML.xmi#_SysML_Libraries_PackageableElement-PrimitiveValueTypes_PackageableElement-Real_PackageableElement'>
							<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
								<referenceExtension referentPath='SysML::Libraries::PrimitiveValueTypes::Real' referentType='DataType' originalID='_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147431819399_50461_1671'/>
							</xmi:Extension>
						</type>
					</ownedAttribute>
					<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367736299722_63977_23526' name='l' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
						<type href='http://www.omg.org/spec/SysML/20150709/SysML.xmi#_SysML_Libraries_PackageableElement-PrimitiveValueTypes_PackageableElement-Real_PackageableElement'>
							<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
								<referenceExtension referentPath='SysML::Libraries::PrimitiveValueTypes::Real' referentType='DataType' originalID='_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147431819399_50461_1671'/>
							</xmi:Extension>
						</type>
					</ownedAttribute>
					<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1367736299750_438771_23542' name='m' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
						<type href='http://www.omg.org/spec/SysML/20150709/SysML.xmi#_SysML_Libraries_PackageableElement-PrimitiveValueTypes_PackageableElement-Real_PackageableElement'>
							<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
								<referenceExtension referentPath='SysML::Libraries::PrimitiveValueTypes::Real' referentType='DataType' originalID='_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147431819399_50461_1671'/>
							</xmi:Extension>

		<text>These interfaces represent the service provided by the inverted pendulum system to the actors. The blocks that realizes these interfaces will have provided directed feature operations.   &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;font style=&quot;font-size:18pt&quot; color=&quot;#990000&quot;&gt;Feedback Control Loop&lt;/font&gt;&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

  &lt;/body&gt;

	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1368093214570_718459_63531'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>203, 84, 406, 60</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
&lt;body&gt;
&lt;p&gt;The SysML Internal Block Diagram of inverted pendulum system shows the connection between pendulum assembly and the computer. Regards to the standard feedback control loop, the pendulum assembly represents the plant and the computer represents the controller.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
	</mdElement>

	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1368073041585_57222_59986'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>231, 49, 378, 22</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;font style=&quot;font-size:18pt&quot; color=&quot;#990000&quot;&gt;Inverted Pendulum System&lt;/font&gt;&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='DiagramShape' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1368073443750_926215_60077'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_17_0_4_17530432_1368068042230_897464_39840'/>
		<geometry>43, 267, 118, 46</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<diagramOverviewScale xmi:value='1.0'/>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1368074255271_815678_60972'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>231, 84, 455, 119</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
&lt;body&gt;
&lt;p&gt;One of the most important and classic problems of control engineering is the inverted pendulum system. Different from the normal pendulum which is stable when hanging downward, the inverted pendulum is inherently unstable. It must be actively balanced to remain upright. Therefore, the system requires a controller, which can be software or firmware. The controller receives system state information from sensors, and performs calculations for the control signal. The control signal is sent to an actuator to control the pendulum&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='RectangularShape' xmi:id='_17_0_4_17530432_1368074676822_34751_61115'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>USE_FILL_COLOR</propertyID>

				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>

				<value xmi:value='true'/>

				<value>SOLID</value>

			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>49, 448, 343, 294</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;color:#ff0000;&quot;&gt;&lt;b&gt;NEW&amp;#160;since 18.3 version!&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;Interface Control Document (ICD) Tables&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Comprehensive views of system interfaces and system assembly are presented with:

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
&lt;a href=&quot;http://docs.nomagic.com/display/SysMLP/Blackbox+ICD+Table&quot;&gt;Blackbox ICD Table&lt;/a&gt;

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
&lt;a href=&quot;http://docs.nomagic.com/display/SysMLP/Whitebox+ICD+Table&quot;&gt;Whitebox ICD Table&lt;/a&gt;

      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
Double click the links below to explore the ICD tables&amp;#160;of the Inverted Pendulum System:

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
	</mdElement>

  &lt;body&gt;
